title: Message from the Director of World Heritage Centre, Lazare Eloundou Assomo, for World Wildlife Day 2026
content:
Mr. Lazare Eloundou Assomo, Director of the World Heritage Centre, shares a message for World Wildlife Day 2026.



play_arrow


 play_arrow Watch



Dear colleagues and friends, our health is deeply connected to nature, from the plants we rely on for medicine to the ecosystems that sustain life.
Protecting biodiversity is also about protecting human well-being. On 3rd March, we celebrate World Wildlife Day in close alignment with the objectives of the World Heritage Convention, notably the ...
creator: wh-info@unesco.org (WH-Info)

title: UNESCO convenes Virtual Brainstorming to strengthen World Heritage higher education in Africa
content:
UNESCO's World Heritage Centre concluded a two-day Virtual Brainstorming on Strengthening World Heritage Higher Education in Africa, held on 23–24 February 2026, with the generous support of the Korean Heritage Service of the Republic of Korea and under the Korea Funds-in-Trust initiative to institutionalise capacity development for World Heritage in Africa.
The meeting gathered over 100 experts from 28 African countries, alongside partner universities from 13 countries outside Africa. ...
creator: wh-info@unesco.org (WH-Info)
